    unix: Be consistent about error handling for unconnected sockets

    SOCK_STREAM and SOCK_SEQPACKET sockets should get the same treatment
    here.

    PR:             176420
    MFC after:      2 weeks

    (cherry picked from commit 1c933f464fdbb630f9663751f04c29cdcda38902)
